It will help improve children's attention and insight, develop and train their imagination and creativity.

FANTASTIC GIFT -TOYMANY Sea Animal Figurine is not only a great Christmas, Birthday gift, it is also used as sea animal themed cake cupcakes/cake toppers and party favors, and baby shower bathtub toys figurine collection decorations.
